---
title: "News"
description: "Research news, publications, presentations, awards, and project updates."
---

Research news will be updated.

## July 2026 — Best Presentation Award at FDC/ANSS 2026

Our presentation, **“Spatial Mapping of Flutter Excitation and Dissipation Based on Aerodynamic Component Decomposition in Potential flow,”** was selected for the Best Presentation Award in Aerospace Numerical Simulation Technology at the 58th Fluid Dynamics Conference / 44th Aerospace Numerical Simulation Symposium.

The study presents a component-resolved aerodynamic-work mapping framework for identifying the spatial regions and physical mechanisms that drive or dissipate flutter.

The award ceremony and invited award presentation are planned for the next FDC/ANSS conference in 2027.

## 2026

### Website launched

This personal research website was established to provide an integrated overview of research activities, publications, projects, and collaboration opportunities.
